messages.content: I want to build an Atlas browser extension that sends my ChatGPT conversation context to Codex.
You should build a browser extension plus a local Bridge CLI. The extension reads the ChatGPT page and the Bridge writes files into the Codex project directory.
I do not want to manually export, download, unzip, or import files. I want a one-click Send to Codex flow.
The MVP should focus on the automatic local context transfer chain. Missing assets should be recorded in assets_manifest.json instead of being silently dropped.

codeBlocks.content: ChatGPT page -> Extension -> Local Bridge -> Codex project .codex-context/

assets.failureReason: Blob URL cannot be fetched from the Bridge
Artifact download is not implemented in MVP
